title: Settings Custom Swipe Sensor
scenario: Custom Swipe Sensor settings section is present and matches design spec in Device Settings for Poly Voyager Free 60, 60+, and 20
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected Poly Voyager Free device (VF60, VF60+, or VF20) to open Device Settings.
Scroll down to locate the 'Custom Swipe Sensor' settings section.
Verify that the 'Custom Swipe Sensor' section is present in the Device Settings.
Tap on 'Custom Swipe Sensor' to open its settings.
Check that all available settings and their default values match the design specification.
expected: The 'Custom Swipe Sensor' settings section is present in Device Settings for supported Poly Voyager Free devices (VF60, VF60+, VF20), and all settings and values match the design specification.
